## [3.10.0] - 2026-01-10

### UX

- Add clear button to AppTextField

### ✨ Features

- **security**: Add input length limits and validation to amount fields
- **a11y**: Add semantics to TypeSelector chips

### 👷 CI/CD

- Use self-hosted runner for Augment PR workflows
